title: Cart rink
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Easteregg|canon=yes}}

[[File:Cart_rink.jpg|thumb|right|The cart rink, with two [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] racing.]]

The '''cart rink''' was a secret [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] outpost located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nod Kartha]], used in their plans for cart-racing domination. It was discovered near a [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] who destroyed it along with the two racing [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''
